subtitle: Security incident response, Marie absent, urgent scoping overdue
context: Marie Cooksey is on annual leave until Monday 15 June - her absence blocks H&S support queue, OSM escalations, DTP1092 college staff project approvals, and volunteer reporting queries. Simon Burford is managing the OSM Self-Service Major Incident involving a critical Ivanti security vulnerability with support from Sarah Warne and Emma Fitz-Gibbon; you need to review the incident thread and communications update from Vicky Marriott immediately. James Salas Guillen returns Thursday 18 June and has handed over DSE user data import, PeopleXD to Cardinus interface, and H&S admin coverage. Sophie Levy at Cority has been waiting since April for your scoping session update on CorityOne and needs a response urgently - she sent RE: Scoping Session update on 8 June at 15:58. Julie Hickman is chasing timeline confirmation from Access Group for case 68974493 (Chemistry bulk-delete request) which you replied to on 8 June but still needs AG's final schedule. Athena Artuso has sent an out-of-office notice. Open the Simon Burford Major Incident email first - it is marked Priority 1 and requires immediate triage.

urgent.title: Major Incident - Ivanti Security Vulnerability
urgent.sub: Priority 1. OSM Self-Service issue. Simon Burford coordinating with Sarah Warne and Emma Fitz-Gibbon. Asta Palmer testing PeopleXD service requests. Review communications update from Vicky Marriott, Major Incident Manager.
urgent.subject: RE: Major Incident - Priority 1 Support Call# TBC - a Security vulnerability with Ivanti.

urgent.title: Cority Scoping Session - Overdue Response
urgent.sub: Sophie Levy (Cority) waiting since April. Sent follow-up 8 June asking for latest information. CorityOne GX2 2026.2 release now live.
urgent.subject: RE: Scoping Session update

urgent.title: Access Group Case 68974493 Timeline
urgent.sub: Julie Hickman chasing schedule confirmation for Chemistry bulk-delete request. You replied 8 June confirming AG ready but need two items from Oxford before proceeding. Follow up on specific items needed.
urgent.subject: RE: Access Support Team | 68974493 - New Case
